Clipboard
Methods

Generated by gi-docgen 2023.3

Method

WPEPlatformClipboardget_formats

Declaration [src] 

const char* const*
wpe_clipboard_get_formats (
  WPEClipboard* clipboard
)

Description [src]

Get the MIME type formats that clipboard can provide.

Return value

Type: An array of utf8

A NULL-terminated array of MIME type formats, or NULL if clipboard is empty.

The array is NULL-terminated.
The data is owned by the instance.
Each element is a NUL terminated UTF-8 string.
